name: Homemade Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix tapioca, cornstarch, sugar, and water in a saucepan until thickened but not boiling.
2. Set aside to cool completely.
3. Add fruit and lemon juice to the cooled mixture.
4. Pour filling into a 9-inch pastry-lined pie pan.
5. Adjust and flute the top crust edges and cut vents.
6. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
